turns.assistantContent:
**Anti-pattern acknowledged:** I wrote a plan instead of delegating to hiveplanner. The orchestrator does NOT plan — it delegates planning. Deleted.

Now properly routing. Wave 1 synthesis is complete with compressed carry-forward. Next wave: delegate planning to hiveplanner + skill quality assessment to skill-judge in parallel (both are independent READ operations).
